title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.0 - Major card redesign: 87-card deck (20 Common / 36 Uncommon / 27 Rare). Reintroduced Shaken/Jaded/Limited as Un- inversion siblings (Sad/Pop/Old Song, Playlist); 25 new cards, 27 retired. Held Note now freezes ALL turn-based buffs/debuffs. My Own Lesson: invertible buff gains become nothing. Fate Knocking sums actual dealt damage; Practice is Stable + Tuned. Renames: Fate->Fate Knocking, Venue->Intermission, Crescendo->Reverb. Requires BaseLib.
